name: Granchiello Spiritello
lore:
Lore of Granchiello Spiritello
                                    


Granchiello Spiritello is an Italian Brainrot character created by TikTok user @novix.01 on the 31st of March, 2025. Eventually, the video, along with his account got deleted due to community guidelines violation. It was later added into Steal A Brainrot.
It is a crab with a larger size, wearing a gangster/rapper accessories and clothes and it can be seen in the downtown streets.
Lyrics
Original (Italian)
Yo, yo, yo, yo, yo, yo, Granchiello Spiritello! Sceso da catania per commettere um macello. Fra tutti i granchi resto io il più bello. Guardati le spalle se non 6 mio fratello canga.
Translated (English)
'Yo, yo, yo, yo, yo, yo, Granchiello Spiritello! I came down from Catania to commit a massacre. Of all the crabs, I'm the most beautiful. Watch your back if you're not my brother bitch.
